hero.description: Premium chauffeur service with Mercedes S-Class, BMW 7 Series, and Tesla Model S. Airport transfers, executive travel, and VIP transportation across Barcelona and Spain.

fleet.title: Choose Your
fleet.subtitle: Every vehicle under 3 years old, maintained to concierge standards.

services.label: Our Services
services.title: Premium Chauffeur
services.subtitle: Every journey crafted to perfection — from airport arrivals to private tours across Catalonia and Spain.

airport.title: Airport Transfers
airport.desc: Meet & greet with real-time flight monitoring. Complimentary 60-minute wait.

cruise.title: Cruise Port Transfers
cruise.desc: Seamless door-to-ship service at Barcelona Cruise Terminal.

executive.title: Executive Chauffeur
executive.desc: Dedicated professional chauffeur for business meetings and corporate events.

corporate.title: Corporate Accounts
corporate.desc: Premium corporate accounts with priority fleet, invoicing, and dedicated manager.

vipEvents.title: VIP Events
vipEvents.desc: Luxury transportation for weddings, galas, film sets, and private events.

hourly.title: Hourly Chauffeur Hire
hourly.desc: Your private driver at your disposal — minimum 4 hours, maximum flexibility.

costaBrava.title: Costa Brava Transfers
costaBrava.desc: Lloret de Mar, Platja d'Aro, Tossa, Cadaqués — the complete coast.

costaDorada.title: Costa Dorada Transfers
costaDorada.desc: Sitges, Salou, PortAventura, Tarragona in maximum comfort.

andorra.title: Andorra Transfers
andorra.desc: Premium transfer from Barcelona to Andorra — shopping, skiing, or business.

hotel.title: Hotel Transfers
hotel.desc: Door-to-door luxury service to all 4 and 5-star hotels across Barcelona.

vip.title: VIP Transportation
vip.desc: Discrete, exclusive service for high-profile clients requiring absolute privacy.

tours.title: Private Day Tours
tours.desc: Montserrat, La Roca Village, Girona wine country, and Dalí's museums.

footer.tagline: Barcelona's premier luxury chauffeur service. Professional drivers, premium vehicles, impeccable service — 24/7, 365 days a year.

newsletter.title: Barcelona Travel Insider
newsletter.subtitle: Exclusive deals, airport tips & luxury travel guides — free.
